dialogos.texto_en: Phew, I made some good deals.\nI have all the souvenirs I need!
Me too!\nI was able to buy something perfect\nfor my school friends.
Did anyone buy a souvenir for Dad?
Yes, I bought him a ryukyu glass paperweight.\nIt seems like something he could use for work too.
I see, you decided to go with a paperweight after all.
(Before I knew it, it was time to meet up.\n I wanted to lead Nino,\n but I haven't done anything...)
(At this rate, I won't be able to show Nino\n the kind of man I am.\n Dammit, how pathetic!)
Hey, can I talk to you?
What?
I found a place nearby\nwhere you can try your hand at making shisa.
It doesn't seem to take that much time either.\nDo you want to go?
(Making shisa?)
Shisa are the lion-dogs\nthat are often placed at entrances\nor on roofs, right? Can you actually make them?
Yeah.\nOf course, they're not very big,\nthey're about the size of your palm.
That sounds like fun.
If we all made them, that'd be a great memory.
Yes, I agree.
How about you, Futaro?
Of course, I'm in!\nI'll make the most lively shisa ever!
What's a lively shisa?
I can tell you're enthusiastic, Futaro...
But, did you like making things like this?
Y-yeah!\nIsn't it fun to create something on your own?
Teehee, it is.\nRight, let's go then!
Alright...
(Now's my chance to show Nino\n my aesthetic sense!)
(I'm not even leading her!\n And this isn't about showing her the kind of man I am.\n NO! This is a matter of my pride and dignity!!)
Uesugi-kun?\nWhy do you have such a scary expression?
It's a sign of my determination.\nJust watch, I'll make the best one there is!
*sigh*
(We headed straight to the shisa-making shop\n and completed the necessary procedures.)
(It turned out that the shisa could be made in about an hour \n and taken home with us.)
(While receiving careful guidance from the staff,\n everyone made their own shisa in their own way%p-2;――%p;)
That was fun.\nI didn't think they would be so easy to make.
Hey, hey, what does your shisa look like, Itsuki?
This is mine.\nI tried to make it just like the model,\nbut what do you think?
Wow! You did a great job.\nIt looks just like the shisa sold in the store.
Yes, exactly like it.
Thanks.\nWhat kind of shisa did you make, Ichika?
Ta-da!\nIntroducing the sprawling shisa.
Ahaha, it's really lying down!
That's so you, Ichika.
Hehe, it's nice, isn't it?\nI thought I'd make a shisa\nthat would protect my sleep.
If it's sleeping, it won't protect you, right?
That's true.\nThis little one seems like\nit would end up sleeping with Ichika.
Oh my, it turned into a cuddling shisa, huh?
Hey, how's yours, Miku?
Here's mine.\nI tried putting armor on it.
Wow, this is quite unique.
It really feels like it's a charm.
Even though you're quintuplets,\nthe ones you made turned out completely different.
Well, our preferences are completely different.
How about yours, Nino-san?
I tried making mine more deformed than the model.\nWhat do you think?
Wow, it's so cute!\nThis could actually be an existing character!
Yeah, it could even be a local mascot.
The merch for that would sell well.\nI'd buy it.
Wh-what's with all the compliments?\nIt's making me uncomfortable.
That's how good your taste is, Nino.
Yeah, we aren't kidding you right now.
Th-thanks.
And, what about you, Futaro?\nWhat kind of shisa did you make?
Ooh...
Futaro-kun, you've been quiet this whole time.\nDo you have so much confidence in your skills?\nAre you gonna show off...?
Ah, you messed it up, didn't you.
Hey...
This is...
I mean, if you wanna laugh, just laugh.
How could I!\nI wouldn't dare laugh at something\nyou worked hard to make in your own way!
(Ugh...\n Itsuki's full-on support is actually painful!)
I mean, this has its own unique style, right?
I'm sure this is what they call surrealism.
You're saying that without even knowing the meaning.
Then, cubism.
Stop enumerating art movements like that!
You should've just followed the example\nwithout forcing anything.
Yeah, you're right.\nI got a little too carried away.
(I was trying to show off my sense of style,\n but ended up getting lost in the process,\n and this is the result of hitting a dead end.)
(What's Nino thinking about that...)
Well, that's just how you are, Futaro.
(How I am...)
(What is she trying to tell me?)
(I can't even lead Nino, and I'm completely useless\n at anything other than studying...)
To be honest,\nI think I'll just disappoint you from now on.
I fell in love with you because you're you, Fu-kun.
(Could it be that Nino\n has just accepted me for who I am...?)
Futaro? What's wrong?
No, nothing.
